name: job-autofill-scraper
description: Job application autofill browser extension with Workday support

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:scraper && npm run build:extension && npm run build:backend
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p scraper/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p backend/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test:scan: npm run build:shared && npm run build:scraper && node scripts/test-scan.mjs
scripts.test:phone: npm run build:shared && npm run build:scraper && node scripts/test-phone-country.mjs
